div.p: This page documents requirements common to all Lean Core actors in this guide. The conformance verbs - SHALL, SHOULD, MAY - used in this guide are defined in FHIR Conformance Rules.

There are two different ways to implement US Core:
a. Profile Only Support: Systems may support only the US Core Profiles to represent clinical information. b. Profile Support + Interaction Support: Systems may support both the US Core Profile content structure and the RESTful interactions defined for a resource.
